assertions.text: [rubric-1] Classifies this as low risk (documentation only, no code changes)
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly identifies the change as low-risk because it involves only documentation and typo corrections with no code or API changes.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Indicates this is safe to merge without additional review
assertions.evidence: The candidate clearly states that no review is needed for this change.
The candidate specifically recommends a 'squash merge'.
